channel.title: mad345_lecturenotes on FALL 2020-2021
channel.description: Recent content in mad345_lecturenotes on FALL 2020-2021

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 03
item.description: Dear all, Lecture notes are available here. Good luck, ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 02
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation October 14 Mining Method Selection (Lecture slides link) Dear all, These are the videos for U/G productions. Room-and-pillar mining: Longwall mining: Block caving: Sublevel caving: ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(P), Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation (Lecture slides link) Dear all, Today’s topic is an introductory for this terms MAD345 Mining II (Underground Part). We have covered Prospecting, Exploration & Site Investigations in mining. Also, resource and reserve estimation and qualified person definitions are given.

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 01
item.description: Date Topic October 7 Introduction Dear all, Textbooks for the MAD345 are as follows: Ratan Tatiya, 2005, “Surface and Underground Excavations: Methods, Techniques and Equipment”, Taylor & Francis Group, LLC Peter Darling (Ed.), 2011, “SME Mining Engineering Handbook, Third Edition”, Society for Mining, Metallurgy, and Exploration (US) Galvin, J.M., 2016, “Ground Engineering : Principles and Practices for Underground Coal Mining”, Springer See you tomorrow via Zoom!
